svg.text: aidebt: gap = y(ai=0) − y(ai=1) over (pay_rate, born_ai_mult) at multiple tmax
blue = AI helps · red = AI hurts (CONFIRM thesis) · contour at gap=0 is the regime boundary
Reference ratio = pay_rate / (born_base × (1 + born_ai_mult)). Default cell: pay_rate=0.15, born_ai_mult=1.5 → ratio=0.20. May 11 claim: regime flips at ratio≈1.5.
Source: paper/scripts/grid_aidebt.py — deps-free, reproducible. aidebt prudence FAILs unresolved (see TODO VV step 6).
